overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight navigating a dark forest at night. The character ascends wooden stairs, passes a grave marker, traverses a rocky passage, and approaches a lit house in the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with dense pine trees

events.description: a large white house with illuminated windows becomes visible through the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along a dark forest path illuminated by flashlight, approaching a set of wooden stairs

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the forest path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
large white building with multiple lit windows visible through the tree canopy
wooden staircase structure becoming visible in the distance along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with dense pine trees flanking a narrow dirt path. The character walks forward with a flashlight, and around the 3-second mark, a large white house with illuminated windows becomes visible through the trees in the distance, establishing the destination.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway and stairs through forest canopy

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs from forest floor to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and walking along an elevated wooden platform with railings

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with railings on both sides
wooden safety railings along the elevated path
wooden safety railings along the elevated path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the forest floor to an elevated wooden walkway, ascending stairs and walking along a raised platform with wooden railings. The house disappears from view behind the trees as the character gains elevation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest floor trail with natural debris

events.description: character passes a wooden signpost on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest floor path, passing a wooden signpost and navigating around natural obstacles

entered.detail: return to ground level dirt trail continuing through the woods
wooden signpost with directional markers beside the trail
large fallen tree trunk lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: After descending from the elevated walkway, the character continues along the forest floor trail, passing a wooden signpost at the 20-second mark and navigating past fallen logs and rocks along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with grave marker transitioning to rocky terrain

events.description: character passes a wooden cross grave marker situated on a mound of rocks beside the path
trail enters rocky area with large boulders and rock walls replacing trees

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden cross grave marker and entering a rocky section of the trail with large boulders

entered.detail: wooden cross grave marker mounted on a mound of rocks beside the trail
large rock formations and boulders flanking the path
large rock formations and boulders flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The trail passes a wooden cross grave marker at 30 seconds before transitioning into a rocky area around 35 seconds, where large boulders and rock walls begin to replace the dense forest vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage between stone walls

events.description: character walks through a natural rock archway or tunnel formed by large boulders

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow passage between rock walls and under rock overhangs

entered.detail: natural stone archway forming a tunnel-like passage through the rock formation
rocky overhang providing partial cover above the trail

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow rocky passage enclosed by stone walls, passing under a natural rock archway at 45 seconds. The environment shifts from forest to rocky terrain with sparse vegetation.

events.description: lit house becomes visible through the trees as character exits the rocky passage

agents.ego_description: approaching a house with illuminated windows and porch light, moving from rocky terrain to a clearing

entered.detail: white wooden house with warm light glowing from windows, previously seen in the distance
covered porch area with illuminated light fixture
shrubbery and bushes lining the approach to the house
shrubbery and bushes lining the approach to the house

segments.scene_description: Exiting the rocky passage, the character emerges into a clearing where the white house with lit windows becomes visible again at 50 seconds. The character approaches the house, which grows from a distant object to fill the frame as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a dark, oppressive forest that gradually transitions into a stark rocky passage before culminating at a lit residence. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by dense pine trees, where a flashlight reveals a distant white house with illuminated windows before the camera ascends a series of wooden stairs and a raised platform. As the character descends back to the forest floor, the path winds past a wooden signpost and fallen logs, eventually passing a wooden cross grave marker. The environment then shifts from dense vegetation to a rugged landscape of large boulders and stone walls, leading the camera through a narrow rocky passage and under a natural archway. Finally, the terrain opens into a clearing where the white house reappears, growing from a distant silhouette to fill the frame as the character approaches.
